welcomeTitle: Let's set up your factory in 5 minutes
welcomeDesc: We'll walk you through creating your first production line, adding a product, entering production data, and seeing your first OEE score. You can always come back to this wizard from Getting Started.
linesDesc: A production line is where your products are manufactured. Create 1-3 lines to get started.
errorNoLineName: Please enter a name for at least one production line.
errorCreateLines: Failed to create production lines. Please try again.
productsDesc: What do you manufacture? Add 1-2 products to track production against.
errorNoProductName: Please enter a name and code for at least one product.
errorCreateProducts: Failed to create products. Please try again.
productionDesc: Enter today's production data for one line. This is the data that will calculate your first OEE score.
errorSelectLineProduct: Please select both a production line and a product.
errorPlannedQty: Planned quantity must be greater than zero.
errorCreateEntry: Failed to record production data. Please try again.
resultDesc: Congratulations! Here is your factory's first OEE calculation. This is your baseline — everything gets better from here.
